items.docs: Returns ok to indicate server is up

params.name: response_type
params.description: Should be set equal to code.

params.name: client_id
params.description: Client ID, obtained during app registration.

params.name: redirect_uri
params.description: Set a URI to redirect the user to. If this parameter is set to urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob then the authorization code will be shown instead. Must match one of the redirect URIs declared during app registration.

params.name: scope
params.description: List of requested OAuth scopes, separated by spaces (or by pluses, if using query parameters). Must be a subset of scopes declared during app registration. If not provided, defaults to read.

params.name: force_login
params.description: Added in 2.6.0. Forces the user to re-login, which is necessary for authorizing with multiple accounts from the same instance.

items.docs: Obtain an oauth token for API requests.
Confirm that the app's OAuth2 credentials work.
Test to make sure that the user token works.
Update the user's display and preferences.

params.name: id
params.description: The id of the account in the database

items.docs: Statuses posted to the given account.

params.name: id
params.description: The id of the account in the database

params.name: max_id
params.description: Internal parameter. Use HTTP Link header for pagination.

params.name: since_id
params.description: Internal parameter. Use HTTP Link header for pagination.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 40.

items.docs: Creates a user and account records. Returns an account access token for the app that initiated the request. The app should save this token for later, and should wait for the user to confirm their account by clicking a link in their email inbox.

params.name: id
params.description: The id of the account in the database
